parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT set_config('app.tenant_id','" + $json.id + "', false); SELECT eo.id, eo.tenant_id, eo.event_type, eo.payload, a.assigned_recruiter_id, c.full_name AS candidate_name, r.title AS req_title FROM event_outbox eo JOIN applications a ON a.id = (eo.payload->>'application_id')::uuid JOIN candidates c ON c.id = a.candidate_id JOIN requisitions r ON r.id = a.requisition_id WHERE eo.processed_at IS NULL AND eo.event_type IN ('offer.created','offer.issued','offer.accepted','offer.declined') ORDER BY eo.created_at LIMIT 50;" }}
